headline: Target makes bold change to win back customers

headline: US economy is 'not that strong' beyond headline numbers
summary: February's Consumer Price Index (CPI) data showed that inflation mostly held steady from January, but there are reasons to believe the economy isn't as stable as headline numbers suggest. Investopedia editor in chief Caleb Silver joins Market Catalysts host Julie Hyman to discuss the ailing consumer's impact on the economy, what continued oil (CL=F, BZ=F) price volatility will mean for future inflation data, and how the Federal Reserve will handle it all. To watch more expert insights and analysis on the latest market action, check out more Market Catalysts.

headline: DA Davidson Raises Target (TGT) PT to $140
